What makes a service-business website AI-ready?

An AI-ready website is not only a beautiful page. It gives people, search engines and AI assistants a consistent source of truth about the business.

1. Clear entity.
The site states who the business is, where it serves, what it offers and how to contact it.
2. Clear offer.
The visitor can understand the service, pricing path, process and next step without a sales call first.
3. Clear proof.
Case pages show what was delivered and what is publicly verifiable, without inventing results.
4. Clear structure.
Pages include stable URLs, metadata, schema, internal links and a source manifest.

LUMIO applies this through SEO foundations, GEO source pages, case pages, structured data and prompt monitoring.
